creator: raimeetravel
caption: my guide to blowing up your life & starting over (at any age!!!) @amd #amdpartner

transcription.text: how to blow up your life and start over in your 30s or really this works for any age we're gonna go step by step with my amd laptop step one admit maybe quietly to yourself that something in your life just isn't working anymore not everything but just enough that you're thinking about it way too often step two before you do anything dramatic you make sure you have a way to support yourself like i didn't just quit and hope for the best i made sure i could work from anywhere first and set up my finances in a way that gave me more flexibility and freedom to step three come up with a plan i planned literally everything from my laptop visas flights money next steps usually with way too many tabs open from cafes airports and random hotel rooms and this laptop was my constant while everything else was changing you need at least one constant and step four emotionally some days you will feel brave and proud and other days you're like wow did i fully just ruin my life both are part of it so starting over isn't really about blowing everything up it's just about giving yourself the space and the tools to build something that actually fits with where you are now
